steps.title: Identify the percent-decline ranking
steps.content: The table shows percent change for each nation: Germany −44%, Switzerland −22%, Brazil −16%, Japan −14%. This ranking determines where Switzerland's decline falls relative to the other three countries.

steps.title: Match the ranking to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice A correctly positions Switzerland within this ranking: its percent decrease was less than Germany's but greater than Brazil's and Japan's. The other three distort the data through misrepresented amounts, fabricated changes, or reversed relationships. That matches choice A — A is correct.
